title: will / shall
examples: Once you figure out what's going on and stuff, you'll just melt into the show and the songs.
And I will see you in the next one.

title: can / could / be able to
examples: I've never got the chance to but I obviously need to get a translator because I can't speak Korean at all.

title: have to / must
examples: My favorite song would probably have to be soda pop.

title: would (habit/conditional)
examples: And would you ever like to visit Korea?
My favorite song would probably have to be soda pop.
I would love to visit Korea. I think it's a pretty cool place.
Would you ever like to visit Korea?
